case_title: JOSEPH PALLADINO VS. SOCO WEST, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ASBESTOS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALLADINO, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT SOCO WEST, INC. CONSOLIDATED INSULATION, INC. DOES 1 TO 800, INCLUSIVE AS REQUIRED BY CALIFORNIA LAW ON JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE 1431.2 ENACTED BY THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-21-2022 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUL-07-2022. DISMISSAL FILED ON JUN-16-2022. (503)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66566626) FILED BY DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED INSULATION, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66665184), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALLADINO, JOSEPH SERVED APR-14-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, MAILING DATE APR-16-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT SOCO WEST, INC.

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT PLAINTIFFS HEREBY DISMISS ALL ALLEGATIONS, IF ANY, RELATED TO EXPOSURE TO ASBESTOS ON OR AFTER DECEMBER 5, 1980 AS TO SOCO WEST, INC. ONLY AND HEREBY AMENDS THEIR COMPLAINT(S) ACCORDINGLY. (TRANSACTION ID # 66668772)

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67733230)
PRELIMINARY FACT SHEET/NEW FILING/ASBESTOS LITIGATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALLADINO, JOSEPH

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66665184), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALLADINO, JOSEPH SERVED APR-09-2021, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE APR-12-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED INSULATION, INC.

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT PLAINTIFFS HEREBY DISMISS ALL ALLEGATIONS, IF ANY, RELATED TO EXPOSURE TO ASBESTOS ON OR AFTER DECEMBER 5, 1980 AS TO CONSOLIDATED INSULATION, INC. ONLY AND HEREBY AMENDS THEIR COMPLAINT(S) ACCORDINGLY. (TRANSACTION ID # 66630692)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 66990712) AS TO DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED INSULATION, INC.
REFUND FROM THE ELIMINATION OF LOCAL SURHARGES (GC 70625) OF $15.00

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE OF APR-21-2022 AND SET FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUL-07-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 503 FOR DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. CASE RESOLVED. KIMBERLY CHU, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. EVANTHIA SPANOS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE COUNSEL SPANOS PRZETAK VIA COURTCALL. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; COURT REPORTER VIA COURTCALL: KIM RICHARDSON, CSR #5915 OF VERITEXT (510)589-3651, EMAIL: CSRKIM@COMCAST.NET (206)
